name: Held Item Change
desc: Player changes their selected hotbar slot.

implementation.overview: C09PacketHeldItemChange switches inventory hotbar slots. Single short field (0-8). Critical for silent slot switching pattern: C09 to block slot -> action -> C09 back to original.

modules.name: Scaffold Silent Slot
modules.purpose: Switch to block slot for placement without visual hand change.
modules.how_it_works: C09 to block slot -> place -> C09 restore. Cancel real C09 during scaffold.

modules.name: NoSlow Slot Cycle
modules.purpose: Cycle held item while blocking to cancel slowdown.
modules.how_it_works: Send C09 to current slot or next slot while blocking.

modules.name: AutoPot Switch
modules.purpose: Switch to potion/food slot, use item, switch back silently.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket. Silent variants use sendPacketNoEvent to avoid loops.
implementation.client_variations: Koks v1: Scaffold slot restore. Gugustus: NoSlow2 cycles slots. Vestige 3.0: KillAura autoblock slot switch. Jigsaw 0.26: AutoSoup/AutoRod/AutoEat all use C09 switch+restore.
